creator: lane@joeandlane.com
text:
Apparently the maintainer suspended this because s/he couldn't contact me 
directly via email.

Please respond to the pr so we can all benefit.

The problem still exists, as described below and in the subject

thanks,

lane

/usr/ports/sysutils/portupgrade/Makefile says:
 
 PORTNAME= portupgrade
 PORTVERSION= 2.1.3.3
 PORTREVISION= 1
 PORTEPOCH= 2
 
 I have run
 
 make deinstall
 make reinstall
 
 in /usr/ports/sysutils/portupgrade, and 
 
 ls -al `which portupgrade` yields
 
 -r-xr-xr-x 2 root wheel 52686 Sep 17 06:52 /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade
 
 However, 
 
 portupgrade --version
 
 yields:
 
 portupgrade 2.0.1
 
 and pkgdb -F still fails, with 
 
 ---> Checking the package registry database
 Missing origin: bsdpan-CPAN-1.87
 -> Ignored. (the package is held; specify -f to force)
 Missing origin: bsdpan-PathTools-3.19
 -> Ignored. (the package is held; specify -f to force)
 Missing origin: bsdpan-Term-ReadLine-Perl-1.0302
 -> Ignored. (the package is held; specify -f to force)
 Missing origin: bsdpan-TermReadKey-2.30
 -> Ignored. (the package is held; specify -f to force)
 Stale dependency: jdk-1.5.0p3_4 -> fam-2.6.10_1 ():
 Install stale dependency? ([y]es/[n]o/[a]ll) [yes]
 can't convert nil into String
 
 
 I am at a loss as to how to upgrade portupgrade any further. Please advise.
 
 Lane
